title: HIVE Digital Reaches 2% of Global Bitcoin Network Mining 9 BTC Daily
text: HIVE Digital Technologies reached 2% of global Bitcoin network hashrate, mining 9 BTC daily and surpassing 20 EH/s. The achievement represents a significant milestone for the company, positioning it among the world's largest Bitcoin mining operations. Daily production of 9 BTC translates to approximately 270 BTC per month based on consistent operational performance. The company's mining efficiency improved substantially with advanced cooling systems and optimized facility designs. HIVE's treasury holdings exceeded 2,200 BTC, representing substantial reserves of digital assets. The company's ability to reach and maintain 2% of global network hashrate demonstrates successful execution of its expansion strategy. Management attributed the strong operational performance to the successful integration of the Bitfarms facility and optimization of its Paraguay operations. The company's position as a 2% network operator provides negotiating power with equipment manufacturers and potential strategic partnerships in the industry.
